name: score-retention-policy
title: Score retention policy
description: Make proxy scoring, retention, and low-score cleanup explainable and testable.
scope: proxy-core scoring/store, proxy-api operations surface, proxy-mcp operations surface, docs, integration tests
creator: nightrain
notes: Current score function exists in proxy-core::store but is opaque to API/MCP clients. First slice should expose score explain and safe manual cleanup before adding background retention jobs.
